Function reference

All functions

MSE.tsreg()
Calculate the mean squared error (MSE) between actual values and forecasts of a time series

Transform the date object

dal_base object
adjust_matrix()

build_model()
Build Model

cla_dtree()

K Nearest Neighbor Classification
cla_majority()
Majority Classification
cla_mlp()
Classification using Artificial Neural Network (ANN)
cla_nb()
Naive Bayes Classifier

Random Forest Classifier
cla_svm()
Support Vector Machine Classification
classification()
classification class
cluster_dbscan()
Clustering using DBSCAN
cluster_evaluation()
Cluster Evaluation
cluster_kmeans()
Clustering using k-means
cluster_pam()
Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering
clustering()
Clustering Class
dal_base()
dal_base object
dal_transform()
DAL Transform
data_sample()
Data Sample
describe()
Describe
describe(<default>)
dal_base object
describe(<ts_transform>)
Describe the ts_transform function
do_fit()
Delegate the task of adjusting the model to the specific methods of each class that implements it.
do_fit(<ts_elm>)
Train an ELM (Extreme Learning Machine) model
do_fit(<ts_mlp>)
Train the ts_mlp model
do_fit(<ts_rf>)
Fits a random forest model to time series
do_fit(<ts_svm>)
Fits an SVM model to time series
do_predict()
Define a generic method and delegate the implementation
do_predict(<ts_elm>)
Make predictions using a previously trained ELM model
do_predict(<ts_rf>)
Make predictions on a new dataset (x) using the fitted random forest model
do_predict(<ts_svm>)
Uses an adjusted SVM model for time series to make predictions
do_predict(<tsreg_sw>)
Performs the prediction step of the temporal regression model
dt_pca()
PCA
evaluate_error()
Evaluate Error
evaluation.tsreg()
Calculate the Mean Squared Error (MSE) error metric and the Symmetric Mean Absolute Percentage Error (sMAPE) error metric
fit()
Fit
fit(<default>)
dal_base object
fit(<minmax>)
Fit MinMax
fit(<outliers>)
Calculates upper and lower bounds based on alpha value
fit(<ts_an>)
Fits the "ts_an" normalization model to a training dataset
fit(<ts_diff>)
Fit the object created by the ts_diff function to the training data
fit(<ts_gminmax>)
Sets the parameters of an object
fit(<ts_swminmax>)
adjust the obj object parameters for the "sw-min-max" normalization method
fit(<tsreg_sw>)
Performs the adjustment (training) of a regression model in time series
fit(<zscore>)
Fit Z-score
fit_curvature()
Fit
fit_curvature_max()
fit_curvature_max
fit_curvature_min()
fit_curvature_min

get_preprocess()
Get Preprocess
inverse_transform()
Inverse Transform
inverse_transform(<default>)
dal_base object
inverse_transform(<minmax>)
Inverse Transform MinMax
inverse_transform(<ts_an>)
Perform the inversion of the transformation performed by the transform.t_an function
inverse_transform(<ts_diff>)
Revert the transform applied in the transform.ts_diff function
inverse_transform(<ts_gminmax>)
Inverse of function "transform.ts_gminmax
inverse_transform(<ts_swminmax>)
Do the inverse transformation of normalized data
inverse_transform(<zscore>)
Inverse Transform Zscore

Removes the first few columns from a data array
minmax()

regression()

sample_stratified()

set_params()
Update an object's parameters
set_params(<default>)
Defines a default method for the set_params function
set_params(<ts_elm>)
Set specific parameters of a ts_elm object
set_params(<ts_mlp>)
Update ts_mlp object parameters
set_params(<ts_rf>)
Allows parameters of a ts_rf object to be updated with new values
set_params(<ts_svm>)
Updates the parameters of an SVM model object for time series (ts_svm)

smoothing_cluster()
Smoothing by cluster
smoothing_evaluation()

smoothing_freq()

smoothing_inter()

`[`(<ts_data>)

transform(<default>)
dal_base object
transform(<fit_curvature>)
transform.fit_curvature
transform(<minmax>)
Transform MinMax
transform(<outliers>)
Remove outliers from data
transform(<ts_an>)
Normalize the input data
transform(<ts_diff>)
Transform the data
transform(<ts_gminmax>)
Normalize time series data
transform(<ts_swminmax>)
Normalizes each line of the input data to the range 0,1
transform(<ts_transform>)
Transform data to objects of class st_transform
transform(<zscore>)
Transform Z-score

tsfil_filter()

tsfil_ma()

tsfil_smooth()

tsfil_swfilter()

tshead()
Extract the first observations from a time series
tsplot()
Plot a time series chart
tsreg()
Create an object of class "tsreg" which is a subclass of object "dal_transform
tsreg_arima()
Time Series AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA)
tsreg_sw()
Create an object of class "tsreg_sw", which is an extension of class "tsreg"
zscore()
